---
title: "Lasso2"
author: "Ruiqi Liu"
date: "2026-02-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Compare glmnet and CVXR
Model:
$$y=-2+\sum_{i=1}^{20} \beta_j x_i+\epsilon.$$
Here $\beta_1=\ldots=\beta_5=1, \beta_6=\ldots=\beta_{20}=0$.

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(CVXR)
library(glmnet)
set.seed(1)
n=100 
p=20 
thresh=1e-22
lambda=0.000001
x=matrix(runif(n * p, 0, 5), n, p) 
xx=cbind(1, x)
b=c(-2,rep(1,5), rep(0, p-5))*3
y=xx%*%b + rnorm(n)
#y=rnorm(n)
fit1=glmnet(x,y, lambda = lambda, thresh = thresh, standardize=FALSE)
coef1=coef(fit1)

beta=Variable(p + 1)
#obj=sum_squares(y - xx %*% beta) / (2 * n) + lambda * p_norm(beta[-1], 1)
loss=sum((y - xx %*% beta)^2)/(2*n)
penalty=lambda*sum(abs(beta[-1]))
obj=loss+penalty
prob=Problem(Minimize(obj))
result=solve(prob, FEASTOL = thresh, RELTOL = thresh, ABSTOL = thresh, verbose = TRUE)
coef2=result$getValue(beta)
v=cbind(as.vector(coef1),coef2)
print(round(v,digits = 7))
```
